CompareTo.returns: An integer value indicating the order relationship.

ConnectionString.summary: Creates the populated connection string from the ConnectionType name.

ConnectionStringFromTemplate.summary: Creates the populated connection string from the template text.

SQLIntegratedConnectionString.summary: Creates the SQL integrated connection string from an internal value.

Name.summary: Gets or sets the DataConfig name.

DbServer.summary: Gets or sets the DbServer instance name.

Database.summary: Gets or sets the Database name.

ConnectionType.summary: Gets or sets the ConnectionType name.

UserID.summary: Gets or sets the UserID name.

Pswd.summary: Gets or sets the Pswd name.
